title: gelseminum fulvum
intro: Gelseminum fulvum, also known as Yellow Stems or Yellow Wood, is a plant species in the Gelsemium genus that is native to the southeastern United States. The plant contains gelsemine, a toxic alkaloid with medicinal properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Gelseminum fulvum have been used to treat conditions such as anxiety, insomnia, and epilepsy, with its health benefits including relaxation, reduced stress, and improved sleep quality. Gelseminum fulvum is typically prepared as a tincture or extract, and is often used in herbal remedies, although caution is advised due to its toxicity and potential side effects.
